extraction.one_line_summary: BARGUIL attacked solo on final circuit climbs in Fermo, winning by 10 seconds after UAE exhausted themselves controlling THOMAS' GC threat
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates burned matches controlling THOMAS (1:08 down) in breakaway, leaving POGAČAR isolated when EVENEPOEL counterattacked circuit
BARGUIL delayed solo move until final circuit climbs after teammate RUSSO worked breakaway, revealing Arkéa sacrifice-then-strike protocol
EVENEPOEL crashed on missed corner during his POGAČAR-following attack, suggesting over-commitment to matching moves without recon
BRAMBILLA dropped from break but regrouped with POGAČAR chase group, showing calculated retreat-and-wait for GC favoritism over break glory

rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: first win in 5 years on 21% ramps suggests renewed climbing punch at age 30
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: strong enough to follow EVENEPOEL and limit losses but UAE domestiques depleted by breakaway control
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: crashed badly on missed corner while chasing POGAČAR, losing time and opportunity on stage favoring his skillset
rider_signals.THOMAS Benjamin: positive: forced UAE to commit resources despite 1:08 deficit, showing Cofidis willing to gamble on stage circuits
rider_signals.RUSSO Clément: positive: sacrificed breakaway chances to set up BARGUIL, indicating high team confidence in his finishing capability
rider_signals.MEURISSE Xandro: neutral: present in breakaway until finale, showing Alpecin willing to commit riders on hilly stages
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: neutral: finished 4th from breakaway, demonstrating solid climbing but unable to match BARGUIL's acceleration
rider_signals.VELASCO Simone: neutral: 3rd place from break shows Astana placing riders in moves but lacking final punch
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: finished with POGAČAR group, limiting losses but not testing GC leader on punchy finale
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: described as lively and finished with leaders despite age, suggesting good form building
rider_signals.BRAMBILLA Gianluca: positive: tactical maturity to drop back from doomed break and rejoin GC chase rather than burn out
rider_signals.GAVAZZI Francesco: neutral: collected KOM points from breakaway for Eolo-Cometa, showing team targeting secondary classifications
